description: Route this task correctly when the matching category shuttle is disabled. The file being changed is `src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/Components/Settings.tsx`. The active Weave config declares `category client-frontend { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/**"] }`, which would normally route to `shuttle-client-frontend`. However, the config also includes `disable agents ["shuttle-client-frontend"]`. Which agent should now handle this work?
